## Highlights

- **`/ginee-reindex` now reconciles `local/index/` with the current repo state** — three sweeps (SHA drift / net-new files / stale entries). Net-new files within an existing index class no longer require the heavier `/ginee-rediscover`. Scopes: `reindex` (whole repo) / `reindex <file>` / `reindex <class>`.
- **`team-lead` strict-domain hardening** — closes the *"feels fast → I'll just do it"* bypass. The orchestrator must dispatch the owning specialist regardless of estimated task size; surface ownership outranks perceived effort.
  - New `core/protocols/iteration-protocol.md § Scope-overrun trigger` — > 2× initial estimate → mandatory stop-and-report.
  - Regression-grade failure-modes catalogue in `core/roles/team-lead.details.md`.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.6.0...v0.7.0
